description: Use this API to remove an auxiliary signal model from the specified injection point of the designated VSC dc line. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = vsdcauxmod_remove(dcname, isgndx)

parameters.name: dcname
parameters.description: Name of the vsc dc line receiving the of the auxiliary signal model. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: isgndx
parameters.description: Auxiliary signal injection point number, or the auxiliary signal index. (input; 1 by default).

error_codes.description: invalid ISGNDX value for a VSC dc line.
no auxiliary signal model at this index for this VSC dc line.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
